tex:
70 students study one of French, Spanish and German.
\newline

\newline
 \\
15 students study French.
\newline

Find the number of students who study German.
\newline

stem.content:
70 students study one of French, Spanish and German.
\newline


The ratio number who study French : number who study Spanish = 3 : 7.
\newline
 \\
15 students study French.
\newline


Find the number of students who study German.
\newline

_rawBody:
70 students study one of French, Spanish and German.


The ratio number who study French : number who study Spanish = 3 : 7. \\
15 students study French.


Find the number of students who study German.


\AnswerLine[][]
\Marks{3}

tex:

\newline
 \\

\newline

Work out the value of $x$.
\newline
